title: Incoming form answer
excerpt:
hey all! 
so how to i change the Incoming form answer in the board? 
i want it to be one of my forms question. 
  
i saw a lot of territorial online but setting has changed. 
any advise?

posts.author: itaikadosi (itai kadosi)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey all!

so how to i change the Incoming form answer in the board?
i want it to be one of my forms question.

Screenshot 2025-11-03 155957404×467 30.6 KB

i saw a lot of territorial online but setting has changed.

any advise?

posts.author: mia-cxmonday (Mia Leath)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Itai,

Mia from monday.com support That’s an excellent question about item naming after a form submission.

To change the item name from the default “incoming form answer”, you must include a “Name” field within your form setup. The text entered into this field by the responder will then be used as the item name on your board.

Hope this helps!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Another option is to use the workflow center to rename the item once the form is submitted. ie “When item is created THEN change column value.”. I use this to combine other columns into the name.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: ee_bt (emily)
posts.cookedHtml:
How did you combine other column values for the new name?

I was able to set up the “change column value’“ workflow, but my only options for the new name were “Item ID” and “Group ID.”

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
You should see the options from the ‘Item’ underneath those.

image1058×768 48.6 KB

posts.author: ee_bt (emily)
posts.cookedHtml:
hmm, strange–I have mine set up the same way, but my column values aren’t available. I tried testing a few different types as well (dropdown, status, text, etc.)

Screenshot 2025-11-21 at 11.44.01 AM1890×1264 261 KB

posts.author: ee_bt (emily)
posts.cookedHtml: Update: I figured it out! I had the trigger set to “When form is submitted” – I changed the trigger to “When item created” and was able to choose from my column values.
